title: MBBS Jobs 2026 – Junior Resident Doctors
shortInfo: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences Recruitment 2026 notification released for 24 Junior Resident Doctors posts. Eligible candidates can apply through email mode on or before 08 June 2026 for this contractual government job opportunity.

basic_details.job_title: NEIGRIHMS Junior Resident Doctors Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 24 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences
basic_details.short_information: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences Recruitment 2026 notification released for 24 Junior Resident Doctors posts. Eligible candidates can apply through email mode on or before 08 June 2026 for this contractual government job opportunity.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the NEIGRIHMS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Medical qualification included in the Schedule – I & II of the 3rd Schedule of the Indian Medical Council Act 1956.
qualification.details: Medical qualification included in the Schedule – I & II of the 3rd Schedule of the Indian Medical Council Act 1956 (persons possessing qualifications included in the part – II of the 3rd schedule should also fulfill the conditions specified in section 13 (B) of the Act). Satisfactory completion of the compulsory internship. Candidate must be registered with the Central/State Medical Council.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the NEIGRIHMS Junior Resident Doctors recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NEIGRIHMS Junior Resident Doctors recruitment is 08th June 2026.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for Junior Resident Doctors?
faq.answer: There are a total of 24 vacancies for the post of Junior Resident Doctors announced by NEIGRIHMS.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a medical qualification included in the Schedule – I & II of the 3rd Schedule of the Indian Medical Council Act 1956, have completed compulsory internship, and be registered with a Medical Council.

faq.question: What is the age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Resident Doctors post is 30 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 56,100 Per Month, along with other admissible allowances.

faq.question: What is the application fee for NEIGRIHMS Junior Resident Doctors recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply by sending their complete application along with required documents via email.

faq.question: What is the selection process for Junior Resident Doctors?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Screening followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for the Junior Resident Doctors position is contractual.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
